# FNLLA Icons Notice

`FNLLA Icons` is the local icon distribution name used by `FNLLA UI`.

This bundle is produced for framework use by TechAyo LTD (techayo.co.uk) and downstream adopters of FNLLA UI.

Source attribution:
- based on the official `lucide-static` package
- original project: `Lucide`
- official source: `https://lucide.dev/`

Licensing, provenance and rebrand rules for maintainers:

- the upstream Lucide `ISC License` permits use, copy, modify and distribute for any purpose, which is what allows this repo to ship a renamed local distribution as `FNLLA Icons`
- that permission remains valid only if the Lucide copyright notice and permission notice stay in all copies, which is why `assets/icons/LICENSE` must always travel with this bundle
- some Lucide icons listed in `assets/icons/LICENSE` are derived from Feather and carry an additional embedded `MIT License` notice; that notice must also remain in copies or substantial portions covering those icons
- rebranding to `FNLLA Icons` is a distribution label only; it does not remove Lucide as the upstream source and does not transfer authorship, origin or trademark ownership
- do not present the upstream artwork as if it had no Lucide origin
- do not replace this local bundle with CDN-hosted icon assets
- keep runtime usage on local paths such as `assets/icons/search.svg` and `assets/icons/sprite.svg`

Branding rule for FNLLA UI:
- public framework documentation may refer to this bundle as `FNLLA Icons`
- legal attribution and provenance must continue to identify Lucide as the upstream icon source
